title: tillandsia dependens f. perusneoides
intro: Tillandsia dependens f. perusneoides, a rare and lesser-known species of the Tillandsia genus, is a type of epiphytic air plant that is native to South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the traditional medicine of the indigenous cultures, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
